results.rendered_html: yayi und yayī (von 1. yā)  UṆĀDIS. 3,159 . adj. laufend, eilend: ugro yayiṃ nirapaḥ srotasāsṛjat die Wolke  ṚV. 1,51,11 . upahvareṣu yadacidhvaṃ yayim 87,2 . ugro vāṃ kakuho yayiḥ śṛṇve yāmeṣu saṃtaniḥ 5,73,7 . pra rudreṇa yayinā yanti sindhavaḥ 10,92,5 . sindhavo na yayiyaḥ 78,7 . arvāñcamadya yayyaṃ nṛvāhaṇaṃ rathaṃ yuñjāthām 2,37,5 . yayīraśvaḥ  UJJVAL.  yayī (yayin  ŚKDR. ) Śiva  UṆĀDIK. _bei_ WILSON .
